guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 47. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_bl: Point to the big BL and say: blblbl. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_br: Now point to the big BR and say: brbrbr.

parent_story: A blue block fell on the grass. A brown brush painted the block.
